title: Cobblemon Dystoria
description: Official Modpack for the Cobblemon Dystoria Server
body:
# ✨ Dystoria – The Original Creator of Shiny Rarities in Cobblemon

## Join Cobblemon Dystoria, the ultimate free-to-play server that evolves with you!

Whether you're a casual explorer or a competitive battler, our vibrant community has something for everyone.

---

## 🚀 Why Dystoria?

* We have made it our mission to give each Pokemon several new Shiny variants.
* Exist over 1 year without Downtime.
* Over **6,000 unique players** have already joined our world!
* A thriving, **active community of 2,000+ Discord members**.
* Seasonal events like **Christmas, Halloween, and more** to keep the fun going all year round!

---

## 🎮 Dystoria’s Unique Features:

* ✅ Only the **Cobblemon Mod** is needed to join – no extra hassle!
* ✅ Completely **F2P** with **no pay-to-win** mechanics.
* ✅ **Breeding, Trading, GTS, Raiding, and WonderTrading.**
* ✅ **Custom Furniture, Cosmetics, Tools, and Weapons** to make your journey unique.
* ✅ **Exclusive Pokémon & Regional Forms** – only on Dystoria!
* ✅ A **Resource World** for gathering materials.
* ✅ **Shiny Rarities** – created first by Dystoria to make every encounter special.
* ✅ **Catch Combos** for hardcore shiny hunters.
* ✅ **Lures** to enhance your exploration.
* ✅ **Server-Wide Events & Tournaments** with amazing rewards.
* ✅ **Overhauled Terrain Generation** for a breathtaking experience.
* ✅ Every official Pokémon from the Cobblemon mod is **obtainable**!

---

## 💬 Join Our Friendly Community

Dystoria isn’t just a server – it’s a **family**. We’re proud of our community where every player matters.
Share your adventures, trade tips, and build memories together.

We also support other players and servers with our **licensed mods**.
If you’d like to use them, simply create a ticket in our Discord!

---

## 🌐 Server Info & Links

* **IP:** play.dystoria.org
* **Discord:** [discord.com/invite/cdUsQcjn3K](https://discord.com/invite/cdUsQcjn3K) & [discord.gg/cobblemondystoria](https://discord.gg/cobblemondystoria)
* **Modpack:** [modrinth.com/modpack/cobblemon-dystoria](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblemon-dystoria)

---

## 🔔 Start Your Cobblemon Journey Today!

Dive into **Cobblemon Dystoria**, where every day is a new adventure.
Don’t miss your chance to be part of one of the **fastest-growing Cobblemon communities in 2025**!

🕹️ **Play Now:** play.dystoria.org
